name: Beastars RPG
description:
I created an RPG, trying to make it as free as possible, where I didn't just insert information, but processed it and added almost everything, and the most important feature is that the timeline starts with the first chapter, but in an RPG there are many characters from the end of the manga.

_________________________________________

I tried very hard, so I would be happy if you could rate this bot in the comments ❤️

NEW UPDATE 🔥🔥🔥: I added NSFW descriptions to all characters and added a lion gang. Now this RPG is gonna be hot!
